use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: collect results directly, Rayon preserves order with collect
fn process_ordered(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| process(item))
        .collect()
}

fn rank_documents(docs: &[Document]) -> Vec<Score> {
    docs.par_iter()
        .map(|doc| compute_score(doc))
        .collect()
}
